sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8704" key="a)nqeleto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθελετός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n8704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preferred,</tr_> Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg-02:194" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">194</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
